mapper.sql: (SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(parent_id, ''), user_id) FROM com_user WHERE user_id = #{userId})
mapper.select: SELECT CASE auth WHEN 'System' THEN 'Y' ELSE COALESCE((SELECT edit_yn FROM cm_topo_auth_group WHERE auth_grp_no = A.topo_auth_grp_no), 'Y') END AS edit_yn FROM com_user A WHERE user_id = #{userId}

choose.when: SELECT grp_no, cnt, #{isshare} AS isshare, (SELECT grp_parent FROM cm_topo_group WHERE user_id = T.user_id AND grp_no = T.grp_no) AS grp_parent, (SELECT grp_name FROM cm_topo_group WHERE user_id = T.user_id AND grp_no = T.grp_no) AS grp_name, (SELECT grp_name FROM cm_topo_group WHERE user_id = T.user_id AND grp_no = (SELECT grp_parent FROM cm_topo_group WHERE grp_no = T.grp_no AND user_id = T.user_id)) AS grp_parent_nm FROM ( SELECT MIN(A1.grp_no) AS grp_no, COUNT(*) AS cnt, MIN(user_id) AS user_id FROM cm_topo_group A1 WHERE A1.user_id = AND A1.grp_no IN (SELECT topo_grp_no FROM cm_topo_auth_group_subgrp WHERE auth_grp_no = #{sessTopoAuthGrpNo}) AND A1.grp_parent NOT IN (SELECT topo_grp_no FROM cm_topo_auth_group_subgrp WHERE auth_grp_no = #{sessTopoAuthGrpNo}) ) T
choose.otherwise: SELECT grp_no, cnt, isshare, parent_id, user_id, (SELECT grp_parent FROM cm_topo_group WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND grp_no = T.grp_no) AS grp_parent, (SELECT grp_name FROM cm_topo_group WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND grp_no = T.grp_no) AS grp_name, (SELECT grp_name FROM cm_topo_group WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND grp_no = (SELECT grp_parent FROM cm_topo_group WHERE grp_no = T.grp_no AND user_id = #{userId})) AS grp_parent_nm FROM ( SELECT MIN(A1.grp_no) AS grp_no, COUNT(*) AS cnt, U1.isshare, U1.parent_id, U1.user_id FROM cm_topo_group A1 INNER JOIN cm_topo_leaf B1 ON A1.user_id = B1.user_id AND A1.grp_no = B1.grp_no INNER JOIN com_user U1 ON A1.user_id = U1.user_id WHERE A1.user_id = #{userId} AND B1.sub_no NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT sub_no FROM cm_topo_leaf WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND grp_no != sub_no) GROUP BY U1.isshare, U1.parent_id, U1.user_id ) T

mapper.select: SELECT A1.grp_no, A1.grp_name, A1.grp_parent, (SELECT grp_name FROM cm_topo_group WHERE user_id = A1.user_id AND grp_no = A1.grp_parent) AS grp_parent_nm, U1.isshare, U1.parent_id, U1.user_id, A1.grp_name AS item_name, I1.item_no, I1.mng_no, I1.dev_kind1, I1.dev_kind2, I1.usr_kind, I1.item_alias, COALESCE(I1.item_size, 3) AS item_size, COALESCE(I1.font_size, 0) AS font_size, COALESCE(CASE WHEN I1.evt_level = -2 THEN 0 ELSE I1.evt_level END, 0) AS evt_level, I1.evt_type, A1.view_type AS temp1, I1.temp2, I1.temp3, I1.user_content, I1.show_label, I1.item_conf FROM cm_topo_group A1 INNER JOIN com_user U1 ON U1.parent_id = I1.user_id AND U1.user_id = #{userId} INNER JOIN cm_topo_item I1 ON I1.grp_no = A1.grp_parent AND I1.mng_no = A1.grp_no AND I1.dev_kind1 = 'GRP' AND I1.user_id = A1.user_id WHERE A1.user_id = AND A1.grp_no IN (SELECT topo_grp_no FROM cm_topo_auth_group_subgrp WHERE auth_grp_no = #{sessTopoAuthGrpNo}) ORDER BY A1.grp_name
mapper.sql:
SELECT TBITM.uniq_id, TBITM.item_name, TBITM.dev_perf, TBITM.xpoint, TBITM.ypoint, TBITM.item_no, TBITM.grp_no, TBITM.mng_no, TBITM.dev_kind1, TBITM.dev_kind2, TBITM.usr_kind, TBITM.item_size, TBITM.dev_ip, TBITM.item_alias, TBITM.font_size, COALESCE(CASE WHEN TBEVT.evt_level = -2 THEN 0 ELSE TBEVT.evt_level END, 0) AS evt_level, TBITM.eng_no, TBITM.evt_type, TBITM.child_cnt, TBITM.temp1, TBITM.temp2, TBITM.temp3, TBITM.user_content, TBITM.show_label, TBITM.dyn_info, TBITM.location, TBITM.icmp_poll, TBITM.item_conf FROM (
SELECT A.uniq_id, COALESCE(NULLIF(B.user_dev_name,''), NULLIF(B.dev_name, ''), B.dev_ip) AS item_name, A.dev_perf, COALESCE(A.xpoint, 950) AS xpoint, COALESCE(A.ypoint, 650) AS ypoint, A.item_no, A.grp_no, B.mng_no, CASE WHEN C.mng_no IS NULL AND B.dev_kind1 != 'LMS' THEN A.dev_kind1 WHEN C.mng_no IS NULL AND B.dev_kind1 = 'LMS' THEN B.dev_kind1 WHEN C.mng_no IS NOT NULL AND B.dev_kind1 != 'LMS' THEN 'DEVLMS' WHEN C.mng_no IS NOT NULL AND B.dev_kind1 = 'LMS' THEN B.dev_kind1 ELSE A.dev_kind1 END AS dev_kind1, B.dev_kind2, A.usr_kind, COALESCE(A.item_size, 3) AS item_size, COALESCE(B.dev_ip, B.dev_name) AS dev_ip, A.item_alias, COALESCE(A.font_size, 0) AS font_size, 0 AS eng_no, A.evt_type, 0 AS child_cnt, A.temp1, A.temp2, A.temp3, A.user_content, A.show_label, NULL AS dyn_info, B.dev_location AS location, B.icmp_poll, A.item_conf FROM cm_topo_item A INNER JOIN cm_dev10 B ON A.mng_no = B.mng_no LEFT JOIN (SELECT up_mng_no AS mng_no FROM cm_lm_map UNION SELECT down_mng_no AS mng_no FROM cm_lm_map) C ON A.mng_no = C.mng_no WHERE A.dev_kind1 IN ('DEV', 'SVR', 'VSVR', 'APC') AND A.grp_no = #{grpNo} AND A.user_id = UNION ALL
SELECT A.uniq_id, COALESCE(NULLIF(B.sub_name,''), B.ip) AS item_name, A.dev_perf, COALESCE(A.xpoint, 950) AS xpoint, COALESCE(A.ypoint, 650) AS ypoint, A.item_no, A.grp_no, A.mng_no, A.dev_kind1, A.dev_kind2, A.usr_kind, COALESCE(A.item_size, 3) AS item_size, COALESCE(NULLIF(B.ip, ''), B.sub_name) AS dev_ip, A.item_alias, COALESCE(A.font_size, 0) AS font_size, 0 AS eng_no, A.evt_type, 0 AS child_cnt, A.temp1, A.temp2, A.temp3, A.user_content, A.show_label, NULL AS dyn_info, '' AS location, 0 AS icmp_poll, A.item_conf FROM cm_topo_item A INNER JOIN nt_cfg_subnet B ON A.mng_no = B.sub_no WHERE A.dev_kind1 = 'SUB' AND A.grp_no = #{grpNo} AND A.user_id = UNION ALL
SELECT A.uniq_id, COALESCE(NULLIF(B.dev_name, ''), A.item_alias) AS item_name, A.dev_perf, COALESCE(A.xpoint, 950) AS xpoint, COALESCE(A.ypoint, 650) AS ypoint, A.item_no, A.grp_no, A.mng_no, A.dev_kind1, A.dev_kind2, A.usr_kind, COALESCE(A.item_size, 3) AS item_size, COALESCE(NULLIF(B.dev_ip, ''), B.url) AS dev_ip, A.item_alias, COALESCE(A.font_size, 0) AS font_size, 0 AS eng_no, A.evt_type, 0 AS child_cnt, A.temp1, A.temp2, A.temp3, A.user_content, A.show_label, NULL AS dyn_info, '' AS location, 0 AS icmp_poll, A.item_conf FROM cm_topo_item A LEFT OUTER JOIN cm_topo_etc B ON A.item_no = B.item_no AND A.user_id = B.user_id WHERE A.dev_kind1 = 'ETC' AND A.grp_no = #{grpNo} AND A.user_id = UNION ALL
SELECT A.uniq_id, COALESCE(NULLIF(B.rack_name, ''), A.item_alias) AS item_name, A.dev_perf, COALESCE(A.xpoint, 950) AS xpoint, COALESCE(A.ypoint, 650) AS ypoint, A.item_no, A.grp_no, A.mng_no, A.dev_kind1, A.dev_kind2, A.usr_kind, COALESCE(A.item_size, 3) AS item_size, CAST(B.rack_u AS VARCHAR) AS dev_ip, COALESCE(A.item_alias, B.rack_name) AS item_alias, COALESCE(A.font_size, 0) AS font_size, 0 AS eng_no, A.evt_type, 0 AS child_cnt, A.temp1, A.temp2, A.temp3, A.user_content, A.show_label, NULL AS dyn_info, '' AS location, 0 AS icmp_poll, A.item_conf FROM cm_topo_item A INNER JOIN s_cm_rack B ON A.mng_no = B.rack_no WHERE A.dev_kind1 = 'RACK' AND A.grp_no = #{grpNo} AND A.user_id = UNION ALL
SELECT A.uniq_id, CASE WHEN B.sensor_name IS NOT NULL AND B.usr_name IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(B.sensor_name, '-', B.usr_name) WHEN B.sensor_name IS NOT NULL THEN B.sensor_name WHEN B.usr_name IS NOT NULL THEN B.usr_name END AS item_name, A.dev_perf, COALESCE(A.xpoint, 950) AS xpoint, COALESCE(A.ypoint, 650) AS ypoint, A.item_no, A.grp_no, A.mng_no, A.dev_kind1, A.dev_kind2, A.usr_kind, COALESCE(A.item_size, 3) AS item_size, COALESCE((SELECT dev_ip FROM cm_dev10 WHERE dev_kind2 = 'RTU' AND mng_no = B.mng_no), B.sensor_name) AS dev_ip, COALESCE(NULLIF(A.item_alias, ''), CASE WHEN B.sensor_name IS NOT NULL AND B.usr_name IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(B.sensor_name, '-', B.usr_name) WHEN B.sensor_name IS NOT NULL THEN B.sensor_name WHEN B.usr_name IS NOT NULL THEN B.usr_name END ) AS item_alias, COALESCE(A.font_size, 0) AS font_size, 0 AS eng_no, A.evt_type, 0 AS child_cnt, A.temp1, CAST(B.sensor_id AS VARCHAR) AS temp2, A.temp3, A.user_content, A.show_label, NULL AS dyn_info, '' AS location, 0 AS icmp_poll, A.item_conf FROM cm_topo_item A INNER JOIN tb_fms_sensor B ON A.mng_no = B.mng_no WHERE A.dev_kind1 = 'SENSOR' AND A.grp_no = #{grpNo} AND A.user_id = UNION ALL
SELECT A.uniq_id, A.item_alias AS item_name, A.dev_perf, COALESCE(A.xpoint, 950) AS xpoint, COALESCE(A.ypoint, 650) AS ypoint, A.item_no, A.grp_no, A.mng_no, A.dev_kind1, A.dev_kind2, A.usr_kind, COALESCE(A.item_size, 3) AS item_size, '' AS dev_ip, A.item_alias, COALESCE(A.font_size, 0) AS font_size, 0 AS eng_no, A.evt_type, 0 AS child_cnt, A.temp1, A.temp2, A.temp3, A.user_content, A.show_label, NULL AS dyn_info, '' AS location, 0 AS icmp_poll, A.item_conf FROM cm_topo_item A WHERE A.dev_kind1 = 'POINT' AND A.grp_no = #{grpNo} AND A.user_id = UNION ALL
SELECT A.uniq_id, COALESCE(NULLIF(B.was_nm, ''), A.item_alias) AS item_name, A.dev_perf, COALESCE(A.xpoint, 950) AS xpoint, COALESCE(A.ypoint, 650) AS ypoint, A.item_no, A.grp_no, A.mng_no, A.dev_kind1, A.dev_kind2, A.usr_kind, COALESCE(A.item_size, 3) AS item_size, CONCAT(B.dev_ip, ':', B.conn_port) AS dev_ip, COALESCE(A.item_alias, B.was_nm) AS item_alias, COALESCE(A.font_size, 0) AS font_size, 0 AS eng_no, A.evt_type, 0 AS child_cnt, A.temp1, A.temp2, A.temp3, A.user_content, A.show_label, NULL AS dyn_info, '' AS location, 0 AS icmp_poll, A.item_conf FROM cm_topo_item A INNER JOIN (SELECT D.dev_ip, W.* FROM cm_dev10 D INNER JOIN nt_svr_was W ON D.mng_no = W.mng_no) B ON A.mng_no = B.was_no WHERE A.dev_kind1 = 'WAS' AND A.grp_no = #{grpNo} AND A.user_id = UNION ALL
SELECT A.uniq_id, COALESCE(NULLIF(B.dbms_nm, ''), A.item_alias) AS item_name, A.dev_perf, COALESCE(A.xpoint, 950) AS xpoint, COALESCE(A.ypoint, 650) AS ypoint, A.item_no, A.grp_no, A.mng_no, A.dev_kind1, A.dev_kind2, A.usr_kind, COALESCE(A.item_size, 3) AS item_size, CONCAT(B.dev_ip, ':', B.dbms_port) AS dev_ip, COALESCE(A.item_alias, B.dbms_nm) AS item_alias, COALESCE(A.font_size, 0) AS font_size, 0 AS eng_no, A.evt_type, 0 AS child_cnt, A.temp1, A.temp2, A.temp3, A.user_content, A.show_label, NULL AS dyn_info, '' AS location, 0 AS icmp_poll, A.item_conf FROM cm_topo_item A INNER JOIN (SELECT D.dev_ip, DB.* FROM cm_dev10 D INNER JOIN nt_svr_dbms DB ON D.mng_no = DB.mng_no) B ON A.mng_no = B.dbms_no WHERE A.dev_kind1 = 'DBMS' AND A.grp_no = #{grpNo} AND A.user_id = ) TBITM LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT user_id, item_no, mng_no, evt_level FROM ( SELECT A.user_id, A.item_no, CASE WHEN B.src_type = 'AP' AND C.show_ap_event = 0 THEN 0 WHEN B.src_type = 'VSVR' AND C.show_vm_event = 0 THEN 0 WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN progress_state = 'A' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN -1 WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN progress_state = 'W' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN -2 ELSE COALESCE(MAX(B.evt_level), 0) + 1 END AS evt_level, A.mng_no FROM cm_topo_item A INNER JOIN ( SELECT src_mng_no AS mng_no, CASE WHEN src_type = 'L4' THEN 'DEV' WHEN src_type = 'SVC' AND B.code = 'TCP_01' THEN 'DEV' WHEN src_type = 'SVC' AND B.code = 'TCP_02' THEN 'SVR' ELSE src_type END AS src_type, B.evt_level, progress_state, NULL AS fms_seq_no FROM tb_com_profile PRO INNER JOIN tb_com_evtcode A ON PRO.system_cd = A.system_cd AND PRO.profile_no = A.profile_no INNER JOIN cm_evt B ON A.profile_no = B.profile_no AND A.evt_cd = B.code WHERE B.src_type NOT IN ('GRP', 'SYSLOG', 'TRAP', 'RTU', 'IF') AND B.status = 'C' AND (B.progress_state IS NULL OR B.progress_state != 'S') AND B.evt_level IN (#{evtLevel}) ) B ON CASE WHEN A.back_mng_no = -1 THEN A.mng_no ELSE A.back_mng_no END = B.mng_no AND COALESCE(A.temp1, 'X') = COALESCE(CAST(B.fms_seq_no AS VARCHAR), 'X') INNER JOIN cm_topo_user C ON A.user_id = C.user_id WHERE A.dev_kind1 NOT IN ('GRP', 'SUB', 'RACK') AND A.user_id = GROUP BY A.user_id, A.item_no, A.mng_no, A.temp1, B.src_type, C.show_ap_event, C.show_vm_event ) TB ) TBEVT ON TBITM.item_no = TBEVT.item_no AND TBITM.mng_no = TBEVT.mng_no

SELECT A.uniq_id, COALESCE(NULLIF(B.user_dev_name,''), NULLIF(B.dev_name, ''), B.dev_ip) AS item_name, A.dev_perf, COALESCE(A.xpoint, 950) AS xpoint, COALESCE(A.ypoint, 650) AS ypoint, A.item_no, A.grp_no, B.mng_no, CASE WHEN D.mng_no IS NULL AND B.dev_kind1 != 'LMS' THEN A.dev_kind1 WHEN D.mng_no IS NULL AND B.dev_kind1 = 'LMS' THEN B.dev_kind1 WHEN D.mng_no IS NOT NULL AND B.dev_kind1 != 'LMS' THEN 'DEVLMS' ELSE B.dev_kind1 END AS dev_kind1, B.dev_kind2, A.usr_kind, COALESCE(A.item_size, 3) AS item_size, COALESCE(B.dev_ip, B.dev_name) AS dev_ip, A.item_alias, COALESCE(A.font_size, 0) AS font_size, CASE WHEN A.dev_kind1 = 'APC' AND C.show_ap_event = 0 THEN 0 WHEN A.dev_kind1 = 'VSVR' AND C.show_vm_event = 0 THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(CASE WHEN A.evt_level = -2 THEN 0 ELSE A.evt_level END, 0) END AS evt_level, 0 AS eng_no, A.evt_type, 0 AS child_cnt, A.temp1, A.temp2, A.temp3, A.user_content, A.show_label, NULL AS dyn_info, B.dev_location AS location, B.icmp_poll, A.item_conf FROM cm_topo_item A INNER JOIN cm_dev10 B ON A.mng_no = B.mng_no INNER JOIN cm_topo_user C ON A.user_id = C.user_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT up_mng_no AS mng_no FROM cm_lm_map UNION SELECT down_mng_no AS mng_no FROM cm_lm_map) D ON A.mng_no = D.mng_no WHERE A.dev_kind1 IN ('DEV', 'SVR', 'VSVR', 'APC') AND A.grp_no = #{grpNo} AND A.user_id = UNION ALL SELECT A.uniq_id, COALESCE(NULLIF(B.sub_name,''), B.ip) AS item_name, A.dev_perf, COALESCE(A.xpoint, 950) AS xpoint, COALESCE(A.ypoint, 650) AS ypoint, A.item_no, A.grp_no, A.mng_no, A.dev_kind1, A.dev_kind2, A.usr_kind, COALESCE(A.item_size, 3) AS item_size, COALESCE(NULLIF(B.ip, ''), B.sub_name) AS dev_ip, A.item_alias, COALESCE(A.font_size, 0) AS font_size, COALESCE(CASE WHEN A.evt_level = -2 THEN 0 ELSE A.evt_level END, 0) AS evt_level, 0 AS eng_no, A.evt_type, 0 AS child_cnt, A.temp1, A.temp2, A.temp3, A.user_content, A.show_label, NULL AS dyn_info, '' AS location, 0 AS icmp_poll, A.item_conf FROM cm_topo_item A INNER JOIN nt_cfg_subnet B ON A.mng_no = B.sub_no WHERE A.dev_kind1 = 'SUB' AND A.grp_no = #{grpNo} AND A.user_id = UNION ALL SELECT A.uniq_id, COALESCE(NULLIF(B.dev_name, ''), A.item_alias) AS item_name, A.dev_perf, COALESCE(A.xpoint, 950) AS xpoint, COALESCE(A.ypoint, 650) AS ypoint, A.item_no, A.grp_no, A.mng_no, A.dev_kind1, A.dev_kind2, A.usr_kind, COALESCE(A.item_size, 3) AS item_size, COALESCE(NULLIF(B.dev_ip, ''), B.url) AS dev_ip, A.item_alias, COALESCE(A.font_size, 0) AS font_size, COALESCE(CASE WHEN A.evt_level = -2 THEN 0 ELSE A.evt_level END, 4) AS evt_level, 0 AS eng_no, A.evt_type, 0 AS child_cnt, A.temp1, A.temp2, A.temp3, A.user_content, A.show_label, NULL AS dyn_info, '' AS location, 0 AS icmp_poll, A.item_conf FROM cm_topo_item A LEFT OUTER JOIN cm_topo_etc B ON A.item_no = B.item_no AND A.user_id = B.user_id WHERE A.dev_kind1 = 'ETC' AND A.grp_no = #{grpNo} AND A.user_id = UNION ALL SELECT A.uniq_id, COALESCE(NULLIF(B.rack_name, ''), A.item_alias) AS item_name, A.dev_perf, COALESCE(A.xpoint, 950) AS xpoint, COALESCE(A.ypoint, 650) AS ypoint, A.item_no, A.grp_no, A.mng_no, A.dev_kind1, A.dev_kind2, A.usr_kind, COALESCE(A.item_size, 3) AS item_size, CAST(B.rack_u AS VARCHAR) AS dev_ip, COALESCE(A.item_alias, B.rack_name) AS item_alias, COALESCE(A.font_size, 0) AS font_size, COALESCE(CASE WHEN A.evt_level = -2 THEN 0 ELSE A.evt_level END, 0) AS evt_level, 0 AS eng_no, A.evt_type, 0 AS child_cnt, A.temp1, A.temp2, A.temp3, A.user_content, A.show_label, NULL AS dyn_info, '' AS location, 0 AS icmp_poll, A.item_conf FROM cm_topo_item A INNER JOIN s_cm_rack B ON A.mng_no = B.rack_no WHERE A.dev_kind1 = 'RACK' AND A.grp_no = #{grpNo} AND A.user_id = UNION ALL SELECT A.uniq_id, CASE WHEN B.sensor_name IS NOT NULL AND B.usr_name IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(B.sensor_name, '-', B.usr_name) WHEN B.sensor_name IS NOT NULL THEN B.sensor_name WHEN B.usr_name IS NOT NULL THEN B.usr_name END AS item_name, A.dev_perf, COALESCE(A.xpoint, 950) AS xpoint, COALESCE(A.ypoint, 650) AS ypoint, A.item_no, A.grp_no, A.mng_no, A.dev_kind1, A.dev_kind2, A.usr_kind, COALESCE(A.item_size, 3) AS item_size, COALESCE((SELECT dev_ip FROM cm_dev10 WHERE dev_kind2 = 'RTU' AND mng_no = B.mng_no), B.sensor_name) AS dev_ip, COALESCE(NULLIF(A.item_alias, ''), CASE WHEN B.sensor_name IS NOT NULL AND B.usr_name IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(B.sensor_name, '-', B.usr_name) WHEN B.sensor_name IS NOT NULL THEN B.sensor_name WHEN B.usr_name IS NOT NULL THEN B.usr_name END ) AS item_alias, COALESCE(A.font_size, 0) AS font_size, COALESCE(CASE WHEN A.evt_level = -2 THEN 0 ELSE A.evt_level END, 0) AS evt_level, 0 AS eng_no, A.evt_type, 0 AS child_cnt, A.temp1, CAST(B.sensor_id AS VARCHAR) AS temp2, A.temp3, A.user_content, A.show_label, NULL AS dyn_info, '' AS location, 0 AS icmp_poll, A.item_conf FROM cm_topo_item A INNER JOIN tb_fms_sensor B ON A.mng_no = B.mng_no WHERE A.dev_kind1 = 'SENSOR' AND A.grp_no = #{grpNo} AND A.user_id = UNION ALL SELECT A.uniq_id, A.item_alias AS item_name, A.dev_perf, COALESCE(A.xpoint, 950) AS xpoint, COALESCE(A.ypoint, 650) AS ypoint, A.item_no, A.grp_no, A.mng_no, A.dev_kind1, A.dev_kind2, A.usr_kind, COALESCE(A.item_size, 3) AS item_size, '' AS dev_ip, A.item_alias, COALESCE(A.font_size, 0) AS font_size, COALESCE(CASE WHEN A.evt_level = -2 THEN 0 ELSE A.evt_level END, 4) AS evt_level, 0 AS eng_no, A.evt_type, 0 AS child_cnt, A.temp1, A.temp2, A.temp3, A.user_content, A.show_label, NULL AS dyn_info, '' AS location, 0 AS icmp_poll, A.item_conf FROM cm_topo_item A WHERE A.dev_kind1 = 'POINT' AND A.grp_no = #{grpNo} AND A.user_id = UNION ALL SELECT A.uniq_id, COALESCE(NULLIF(B.was_nm, ''), A.item_alias) AS item_name, A.dev_perf, COALESCE(A.xpoint, 950) AS xpoint, COALESCE(A.ypoint, 650) AS ypoint, A.item_no, A.grp_no, A.mng_no, A.dev_kind1, A.dev_kind2, A.usr_kind, COALESCE(A.item_size, 3) AS item_size, CONCAT(B.dev_ip, ':', B.conn_port) AS dev_ip, COALESCE(A.item_alias, B.was_nm) AS item_alias, COALESCE(A.font_size, 0) AS font_size, COALESCE(CASE WHEN A.evt_level = -2 THEN 0 ELSE A.evt_level END, 0) AS evt_level, 0 AS eng_no, A.evt_type, 0 AS child_cnt, A.temp1, A.temp2, A.temp3, A.user_content, A.show_label, NULL AS dyn_info, '' AS location, 0 AS icmp_poll, A.item_conf FROM cm_topo_item A INNER JOIN (SELECT D.dev_ip, W.* FROM cm_dev10 D INNER JOIN nt_svr_was W ON D.mng_no = W.mng_no) B ON A.mng_no = B.was_no WHERE A.dev_kind1 = 'WAS' AND A.grp_no = #{grpNo} AND A.user_id = UNION ALL SELECT A.uniq_id, COALESCE(NULLIF(B.dbms_nm, ''), A.item_alias) AS item_name, A.dev_perf, COALESCE(A.xpoint, 950) AS xpoint, COALESCE(A.ypoint, 650) AS ypoint, A.item_no, A.grp_no, A.mng_no, A.dev_kind1, A.dev_kind2, A.usr_kind, COALESCE(A.item_size, 3) AS item_size, CONCAT(B.dev_ip, ':', B.dbms_port) AS dev_ip, COALESCE(A.item_alias, B.dbms_nm) AS item_alias, COALESCE(A.font_size, 0) AS font_size, COALESCE(CASE WHEN A.evt_level = -2 THEN 0 ELSE A.evt_level END, 0) AS evt_level, 0 AS eng_no, A.evt_type, 0 AS child_cnt, A.temp1, A.temp2, A.temp3, A.user_content, A.show_label, NULL AS dyn_info, '' AS location, 0 AS icmp_poll, A.item_conf FROM cm_topo_item A INNER JOIN (SELECT D.dev_ip, DB.* FROM cm_dev10 D INNER JOIN nt_svr_dbms DB ON D.mng_no = DB.mng_no) B ON A.mng_no = B.dbms_no WHERE A.dev_kind1 = 'DBMS' AND A.grp_no = #{grpNo} AND A.user_id =
mapper.select:
SELECT ITEM.*, CI.img_kind3, CDS.ha_status FROM ( SELECT A.uniq_id, B.grp_name AS item_name, A.dev_perf, COALESCE(A.xpoint, 950) AS xpoint, COALESCE(A.ypoint, 650) AS ypoint, A.item_no, A.grp_no, A.mng_no, A.dev_kind1, A.dev_kind2, A.usr_kind, COALESCE(A.item_size, 3) AS item_size, B.grp_name AS dev_ip, A.item_alias, COALESCE(A.font_size, 0) AS font_size, COALESCE(CASE WHEN A.evt_level = -2 THEN 0 ELSE A.evt_level END, 1) AS evt_level, 0 AS eng_no, A.evt_type, 0 AS child_cnt, B.view_type AS temp1, A.temp2, A.temp3, A.user_content, A.show_label, NULL AS dyn_info, '' AS location, 0 AS icmp_poll, A.item_conf FROM cm_topo_item A INNER JOIN cm_topo_group B ON A.grp_no = B.grp_parent AND A.mng_no = B.grp_no AND A.user_id = B.user_id WHERE A.dev_kind1 = 'GRP' AND A.user_id = AND A.grp_no = #{grpNo} GROUP BY A.item_no, A.uniq_id, B.grp_name, A.dev_perf, A.xpoint, A.ypoint, A.grp_no, A.mng_no, A.dev_kind1, A.dev_kind2, A.usr_kind, A.item_size, A.item_alias, A.font_size, A.evt_level, A.evt_type, B.view_type, A.temp2, A.temp3, A.user_content, A.show_label, A.item_conf UNION ALL
) ITEM LEFT OUTER JOIN com_img CI ON ITEM.usr_kind = CI.img_uid LEFT JOIN cm_dev10_status CDS ON ITEM.mng_no = CDS.mng_no

SELECT ITEM.*, CI.img_kind3, CDS.ha_status FROM ( SELECT A.uniq_id, B.grp_name AS item_name, A.dev_perf, COALESCE(A.xpoint, 950) AS xpoint, COALESCE(A.ypoint, 650) AS ypoint, A.item_no, A.grp_no, A.mng_no, A.dev_kind1, A.dev_kind2, A.usr_kind, COALESCE(A.item_size, 3) AS item_size, B.grp_name AS dev_ip, A.item_alias, COALESCE(A.font_size, 0) AS font_size, COALESCE(CASE WHEN A.evt_level = -2 THEN 0 ELSE A.evt_level END, 0) AS evt_level, 0 AS eng_no, A.evt_type, 0 AS child_cnt, B.view_type AS temp1, A.temp2, A.temp3, A.user_content, A.show_label, NULL AS dyn_info, '' AS location, 0 AS icmp_poll, A.item_conf FROM cm_topo_item A INNER JOIN cm_topo_group B ON A.grp_no = B.grp_parent AND A.mng_no = B.grp_no AND A.user_id = B.user_id INNER JOIN cm_topo_user C ON A.user_id = C.user_id WHERE A.dev_kind1 = 'GRP' AND A.user_id = AND A.grp_no = #{grpNo} GROUP BY A.item_no, A.uniq_id, B.grp_name, A.dev_perf, A.xpoint, A.ypoint, A.grp_no, A.mng_no, A.dev_kind1, A.dev_kind2, A.usr_kind, A.item_size, A.item_alias, A.font_size, A.evt_level, A.evt_type, B.view_type, A.temp2, A.temp3, A.user_content, A.show_label, A.item_conf UNION ALL
) ITEM LEFT OUTER JOIN com_img CI ON ITEM.usr_kind = CI.img_uid LEFT JOIN cm_dev10_status CDS ON ITEM.mng_no = CDS.mng_no

SELECT A.link_no, A.mng_no1, A.mng_no2, A.if_idx1, A.if_idx2, A.item_no1, A.item_no2, COALESCE(CASE WHEN A.evt_level1 = -2 THEN 0 ELSE A.evt_level1 END, 1) AS evt_level1, COALESCE(CASE WHEN A.evt_level2 = -2 THEN 0 ELSE A.evt_level2 END, 1) AS evt_level2, COALESCE(T1.line_width, 0) AS line_width1, COALESCE(T2.line_width, 0) AS line_width2, T1.if_name AS link_name1, T2.if_name AS link_name2, COALESCE(A.link_idx1, 0) AS link_idx1, COALESCE(A.link_idx2, 0) AS link_idx2, COALESCE(A.traffic_type1, 'I') AS traffic_type1, COALESCE(A.traffic_type2, 'I') AS traffic_type2, COALESCE(A.traffic1, 0) AS traffic1, COALESCE(A.traffic2, 0) AS traffic2, COALESCE(A.traffic1_in, 0) AS traffic1_in, COALESCE(A.traffic1_out, 0) AS traffic1_out, COALESCE(A.traffic2_in, 0) AS traffic2_in, COALESCE(A.traffic2_out, 0) AS traffic2_out, A.point1, A.point2, A.point3, A.is_main, A.is_multi, COALESCE(A.line_size, 1) AS line_size, COALESCE(A.line_type, 1) AS line_type, A.gc_no, A.sh_evt, COALESCE(A.line_point_ud1, 0) AS line_point_ud1, COALESCE(A.line_point_ud2, 0) AS line_point_ud2, COALESCE(A.line_point_lr1, 0) AS line_point_lr1, COALESCE(A.line_point_lr2, 0) AS line_point_lr2, A.curve_x1, A.curve_y1, A.curve_x2, A.curve_y2, COALESCE(A.line_style, '') AS line_style, A.line_color, A.polling_color, CASE WHEN A.polling_color IS NULL AND A.mng_no1 IS NOT NULL AND A.if_idx1 IS NOT NULL THEN B.polling_color ELSE NULL END AS user_polling_line_color1, CASE WHEN A.polling_color IS NULL AND A.mng_no2 IS NOT NULL AND A.if_idx2 IS NOT NULL THEN B.polling_color ELSE NULL END AS user_polling_line_color2, COALESCE(A.line_traffic_effect, 'None') AS line_traffic_effect, CASE WHEN COALESCE(A.line_traffic_effect_speed, 0) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE A.line_traffic_effect_speed END AS line_traffic_effect_speed, COALESCE(A.line_flow_effect, 'None') AS line_flow_effect, CASE WHEN COALESCE(A.line_flow_effect_speed, 0) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE A.line_flow_effect_speed END AS line_flow_effect_speed, CASE WHEN COALESCE(A.line_flow_effect_count, 0) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE A.line_flow_effect_count END AS line_flow_effect_count, A.line_flow_effect_color, A.line_label_conf FROM cm_topo_link A INNER JOIN cm_topo_user B ON A.user_id = B.user_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT mng_no, if_idx, name AS if_name, band_width AS line_width FROM nt_svr_network UNION ALL SELECT mng_no, if_idx, COALESCE(NULLIF(COALESCE(NULLIF(if_alias, ''), user_if_name), ''), if_name) AS if_name, CASE WHEN user_line_width_poll = 1 THEN COALESCE(user_line_width, 0) ELSE COALESCE(line_width, 0) END AS line_width FROM cm_dev20 ) T1 ON A.mng_no1 = T1.mng_no AND A.if_idx1 = T1.if_idx LEFT JOIN ( SELECT mng_no, if_idx, name AS if_name, band_width AS line_width FROM nt_svr_network UNION ALL SELECT mng_no, if_idx, COALESCE(NULLIF(COALESCE(NULLIF(if_alias, ''), user_if_name), ''), if_name) AS if_name, CASE WHEN user_line_width_poll = 1 THEN COALESCE(user_line_width, 0) ELSE COALESCE(line_width, 0) END AS line_width FROM cm_dev20 ) T2 ON A.mng_no2 = T2.mng_no AND A.if_idx2 = T2.if_idx WHERE A.grp_no = #{grpNo} AND A.user_id =

SELECT COALESCE(CTG.bg_file_nm, 'BG_Default') AS bg_file_nm, CTG.grp_no, CTG.grp_name, CTG.grp_parent, COALESCE(CTG.view_type, 'TOPO') AS view_type, TGRP.path_name FROM cm_topo_group CTG INNER JOIN ( WITH RECURSIVE CTE AS ( SELECT grp_no, grp_name, grp_parent, CAST(grp_name AS VARCHAR(200)) AS path_name FROM cm_topo_group WHERE grp_no = (SELECT grp_no FROM cm_topo_group WHERE grp_parent = 0 AND user_id = ) AND user_id = UNION ALL SELECT a.grp_no, a.grp_name, a.grp_parent, CONCAT(b.path_name, ' > ', a.grp_name) FROM cm_topo_group a INNER JOIN CTE b ON a.grp_parent = b.grp_no WHERE a.user_id = ) SELECT DISTINCT * FROM CTE ) TGRP ON CTG.grp_no = TGRP.grp_no WHERE CTG.grp_no = #{grpNo} AND CTG.user_id =
SELECT img_no, img_name, img_uid, img, img_kind1, img_kind2, img_kind3, s_conf FROM com_img WHERE img_kind1 = 'MAP' AND s_conf = 1

SELECT DISTINCT TO_CHAR(TO_TIMESTAMP(CONCAT(EVT.yyyymmdd, EVT.hhmmss), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS ymdhms, EVT.evt_level, CD10.code_value1 AS evt_level_str, EVTCD.evt_nm AS evt_name, EVT.src_type, CMCD.code_value1 AS src_type_str, CASE WHEN EVT.src_type IN ('DEV', 'SYSLOG', 'TRAP', 'SVR', 'WAS', 'DBMS', 'ONU', 'VSVR', 'AP') THEN (SELECT CONCAT(COALESCE(NULLIF(user_dev_name, ''), dev_name), '[', dev_ip, ']') FROM cm_dev10 WHERE mng_no = EVT.src_mng_no) WHEN EVT.src_type = 'IF' THEN (SELECT CONCAT(COALESCE(NULLIF(T1.user_dev_name, ''), T1.dev_name), '[', T1.dev_ip, '] - ', COALESCE(NULLIF(T2.user_if_name, ''), T2.if_name)) FROM cm_dev10 T1 INNER JOIN cm_dev20 T2 ON T1.mng_no = T2.mng_no WHERE T1.mng_no = EVT.src_mng_no AND T2.if_idx = EVT.src_idx) WHEN EVT.src_type = 'GRP' THEN (SELECT grp_name FROM nt_cfg_group WHERE grp_no = EVT.src_grp_no) WHEN EVT.src_type = 'RACK' THEN (SELECT CONCAT(rack_name, '[', rack_ip, ':', rack_port, ']') FROM s_cm_rack WHERE rack_no = EVT.src_mng_no) WHEN EVT.src_type = 'SUB' THEN (SELECT CONCAT(sub_name, '[', ip, ']') FROM nt_cfg_subnet WHERE sub_no = EVT.src_sub_no) WHEN EVT.src_type = 'SVC' THEN (SELECT CONCAT(svc_name, '[', SPLIT_PART(svc_info, ':', 1), ']-', SPLIT_PART(svc_info, ':', 2)) FROM tb_com_service WHERE svc_no = EVT.src_svr_no AND mng_no = EVT.src_mng_no) ELSE '' END AS src_info, TOPO.item_no, TOPO.grp_no, TGRP.grp_name, TOPO.mng_no, TOPO.dev_ip, TOPO.user_dev_name, TOPO.dev_name, TGRP.path_name, TOPO.rack_no FROM cm_evt EVT INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM tb_com_evtcode WHERE profile_no = 0) EVTCD ON EVT.code = EVTCD.evt_cd INNER JOIN ( WITH RECURSIVE CTE AS ( SELECT grp_no, grp_name, grp_parent, CAST(grp_name AS VARCHAR(200)) AS path_name FROM cm_topo_group WHERE grp_no = #{grpNo} AND user_id = UNION ALL SELECT a.grp_no, a.grp_name, a.grp_parent, CONCAT(b.path_name, ' > ', a.grp_name) FROM cm_topo_group a INNER JOIN CTE b ON a.grp_parent = b.grp_no WHERE a.user_id = ) SELECT DISTINCT * FROM CTE ) TGRP ON TRUE INNER JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT A.item_no, A.grp_no, B.mng_no, B.dev_ip, B.user_dev_name, B.dev_name, A.dev_kind1, A.evt_level, '' AS rack_no FROM cm_topo_item A INNER JOIN cm_dev10 B ON A.mng_no = B.mng_no WHERE A.dev_kind1 IN (#{item}) AND A.user_id = UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT A.item_no, A.grp_no, A.mng_no, B.ip AS dev_ip, '' AS user_dev_name, B.sub_name AS dev_name, A.dev_kind1, A.evt_level, '' AS rack_no FROM cm_topo_item A INNER JOIN nt_cfg_subnet B ON A.mng_no = B.sub_no WHERE A.dev_kind1 = 'SUB' AND A.user_id = UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT A.item_no, A.grp_no, D.mng_no, D.dev_ip, D.user_dev_name, D.dev_name, D.dev_kind1, A.evt_level, CAST(B.rack_no AS VARCHAR) AS rack_no FROM cm_topo_item A INNER JOIN s_cm_rack B ON A.mng_no = B.rack_no INNER JOIN s_cm_rack_conf C ON B.rack_no = C.rack_no INNER JOIN cm_dev10 D ON C.mng_no = D.mng_no WHERE A.dev_kind1 = 'RACK' AND COALESCE(C.dev_kind1, '') != 'DEV_ETC' AND A.user_id = ) TOPO ON EVT.src_mng_no = TOPO.mng_no AND TOPO.grp_no = TGRP.grp_no LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM cm_code10 WHERE code_kind = 'WEB_CONF' AND code_id LIKE '%EVT_LEVEL%') CD10 ON EVT.evt_level = CAST(CD10.code_value3 AS INTEGER) LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM cm_code10 WHERE code_kind = 'EVT_CD') CMCD ON EVT.code = CMCD.code_id WHERE EVT.status = 'C' AND (EVT.progress_state IS NULL OR EVT.progress_state != 'S')
AND TOPO.grp_no IN (SELECT topo_grp_no FROM cm_topo_auth_group_subgrp WHERE auth_grp_no = #{sessTopoAuthGrpNo})
ORDER BY ymdhms DESC

SELECT DISTINCT TO_CHAR(TO_TIMESTAMP(CONCAT(EVT.yyyymmdd, EVT.hhmmss), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS ymdhms, EVT.evt_level, CD10.code_value1 AS evt_level_str, EVTCD.evt_nm AS evt_name, EVT.src_type, '' AS src_type_str, CASE WHEN EVT.src_type IN ('DEV', 'SVR', 'VSVR', 'AP') THEN (SELECT CONCAT(COALESCE(NULLIF(user_dev_name, ''), dev_name), '[', dev_ip, ']') FROM cm_dev10 WHERE mng_no = EVT.src_mng_no) WHEN EVT.src_type = 'IF' THEN (SELECT CONCAT(COALESCE(NULLIF(T1.user_dev_name, ''), T1.dev_name), '[', T1.dev_ip, '] - ', COALESCE(NULLIF(T2.user_if_name, ''), T2.if_name)) FROM cm_dev10 T1 INNER JOIN cm_dev20 T2 ON T1.mng_no = T2.mng_no WHERE T1.mng_no = EVT.src_mng_no AND T2.if_idx = EVT.src_idx) ELSE '' END AS src_info, TOPO.item_no, TOPO.grp_no, TGRP.grp_name, TOPO.mng_no, TOPO.dev_ip, TOPO.user_dev_name, TOPO.dev_name, TGRP.path_name, TOPO.rack_no FROM tb_com_topo_evt EVT INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM tb_com_evtcode WHERE profile_no = 0) EVTCD ON EVT.code = EVTCD.evt_cd INNER JOIN ( WITH RECURSIVE CTE AS ( SELECT grp_no, grp_name, grp_parent, CAST(grp_name AS VARCHAR(200)) AS path_name FROM cm_topo_group WHERE grp_no = #{grpNo} AND user_id = UNION ALL SELECT a.grp_no, a.grp_name, a.grp_parent, CONCAT(b.path_name, ' > ', a.grp_name) FROM cm_topo_group a INNER JOIN CTE b ON a.grp_parent = b.grp_no WHERE a.user_id = ) SELECT DISTINCT * FROM CTE ) TGRP ON TRUE INNER JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT A.item_no, A.grp_no, B.mng_no, B.dev_ip, B.user_dev_name, B.dev_name, A.dev_kind1, A.evt_level, '' AS rack_no FROM cm_topo_item A INNER JOIN cm_dev10 B ON A.mng_no = B.mng_no WHERE A.dev_kind1 IN (#{item}) AND A.user_id = ) TOPO ON EVT.src_mng_no = TOPO.mng_no AND TOPO.grp_no = TGRP.grp_no LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM cm_code10 WHERE code_kind = 'WEB_CONF' AND code_id LIKE '%EVT_LEVEL%') CD10 ON EVT.evt_level = CAST(CD10.code_value3 AS INTEGER) WHERE EVT.status = 'C' AND (EVT.progress_state IS NULL OR EVT.progress_state != 'S') ORDER BY ymdhms DESC
